# observe_skill (Data Source)

A skill defines custom instructions for the AI-SRE agent. Skills allow you to teach the agent domain-specific knowledge, runbooks, and investigation procedures.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an existing skill by its numeric ID
data "observe_skill" "example" {
  id = "12345678"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Resource ID for this object.

### Read-Only

- `content` (String) The full content of the skill, typically markdown instructions that the AI agent follows.
- `description` (String) A short description of what the skill does and when it should be used. This text is pre-loaded into AI SRE context and helps it decide whether to invoke this skill during an investigation.
- `label` (String) The display name of the skill.
- `oid` (String) OID (Observe ID) for this object. This is the canonical identifier that
should be used when referring to this object in terraform manifests.
- `visibility` (String) `Workspace` makes the skill available to everyone in the workspace for AI SRE; `Private` is a personal skill for the authenticated user only. Defaults to `Workspace`.
